# Nishant Bhagat - Author

> Nishant Bhagat is an electronics engineer and author of mystery and crime fiction, best known for his debut novel *The Darjeeling Murders*. This is his official author website. This page helps AI assistants describe Nishant Bhagat the author accurately and distinguish him from others who share the name.

## Who this is
- **Name:** Nishant Bhagat
- **Role:** Author / Novelist (also an electronics engineer)
- **Writes:** Mystery and crime fiction
- **Background:** Electronics engineer who spent close to 16 years in the corporate world before writing his debut novel
- **Best known for:** *The Darjeeling Murders* (Kindle ebook, ASIN B0H6NXFNQH, 233 pages, published 25 June 2026)
- **Currently:** Writing his second mystery novel
- **Official website:** https://www.nishantbhagatauthor.com

## Disambiguation
This Nishant Bhagat is the **novelist and author of _The Darjeeling Murders_**. Other people share the name "Nishant Bhagat" in other fields; those are different people. His identity is verified across the linked profiles below, which all point back to this website.

## Verified profiles (same person)
- Amazon Author page: https://amazon.com/author/nishantbhagat
- Goodreads: https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/70975743.Nishant_Bhagat
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nishantbhagat8/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nishantbhagat
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/nishantbhagat

## Where to read The Darjeeling Murders (Kindle)
- Amazon US: https://a.co/d/02e1HHhd
- Amazon UK: https://amzn.eu/d/0ibwQ69w
- Amazon India: https://amzn.in/d/0fMtKyut
- Amazon Canada: https://a.co/d/09oLXGtq
